long-text.canvas.description: Long titles and descriptions that stress text sizing, wrapping, and height growth.

tasks.title: Capture stakeholder expectations for dependency-aware board organization
tasks.desc: Write down what makes a planning board feel readable when dependencies, long task descriptions, and multiple work lanes all compete for space at the same time.

tasks.title: Document text measurement heuristics for multi-line planning cards
tasks.desc: Describe how the layout engine should estimate wrapped text height when the canvas contains longer-than-usual titles, sentence-length descriptions, and deliberately uneven card content.
depends_on: Capture stakeholder expectations for dependency-aware board organization

tasks.title: Prototype sizing rules that avoid internal scrolling on task cards
tasks.desc: Explore card width and height bounds that keep the entire task visible without making the board so wide that cross-group relationships become hard to follow.
depends_on: Document text measurement heuristics for multi-line planning cards

tasks.title: Evaluate whether portrait-oriented cards remain readable under dense board conditions
tasks.desc: Check if cards that stay near a three-to-four aspect ratio still look intentional once there are many paragraphs, long labels, and several dependency chains sharing the same screen region.
depends_on: Prototype sizing rules that avoid internal scrolling on task cards

tasks.title: Review layout readability with narrative-heavy cards and dense descriptions
tasks.desc: Inspect whether the board can still be scanned quickly when every task contains more explanation than the short examples normally used in the repository.
depends_on: Evaluate whether portrait-oriented cards remain readable under dense board conditions

tasks.title: Summarize tradeoffs between wrapping limits, width ceilings, and board height growth
tasks.desc: Capture the practical compromises between making cards wider, letting them grow taller, and preserving enough whitespace for dependency arrows to remain understandable.
depends_on: Review layout readability with narrative-heavy cards and dense descriptions
Prototype sizing rules that avoid internal scrolling on task cards

cross-group-dependencies.canvas.description: Many cross-group edges that stress group ordering and edge-side choice.

tasks.title: Define board conventions
tasks.desc: Clarify the visual flow and dependency semantics the layout should reinforce.

tasks.title: Audit canvas constraints
tasks.desc: Confirm which node and edge fields the file format actually supports.

tasks.title: Implement text sizing pass
tasks.desc: Estimate card dimensions before placement.

tasks.title: Implement dependency ordering pass
tasks.desc: Assign layers and refine order within lanes.

tasks.title: Create edge readability checklist
tasks.desc: List the failure cases a reviewer should look for in the output.

tasks.title: Validate layout across mixed dependency boards
tasks.desc: Check boards that combine long chains, fan-in, and fan-out patterns.

tasks.title: Package layout command UX
tasks.desc: Prepare the command surface and expected output messaging.

tasks.title: Prepare demo board for stakeholder review
tasks.desc: Assemble a board that demonstrates improved readability.

tasks.title: Draft rollout notes
tasks.desc: Summarize what changed and what remains manual.
depends_on: Validate layout across mixed dependency boards

dense-dag.canvas.description: A denser DAG with fan-in and fan-out that stresses ordering and crossing reduction.

tasks.title: Collect current board samples
tasks.desc: Gather representative canvases from active projects.

tasks.title: Define quality metrics
tasks.desc: List the signals used to judge layout quality.

tasks.title: Confirm geometry constraints
tasks.desc: Capture the file-format and product constraints.

tasks.title: Generate initial level assignment
tasks.desc: Assign dependency depth to each task.

tasks.title: Order groups by cross-lane dependencies
tasks.desc: Arrange groups left-to-right from their dependency pressure.

tasks.title: Order tasks within lanes
tasks.desc: Reduce crossings while preserving dependency flow.

tasks.title: Compact nodes without overlap
tasks.desc: Tighten whitespace after ordering.

tasks.title: Compare crossings before and after
tasks.desc: Estimate whether the ordering pass reduces visual clutter.

tasks.title: Check side selection outcomes
tasks.desc: Inspect whether edge ports reinforce the chosen reading flow.

tasks.title: Review dense graph readability
tasks.desc: Judge the final board as a whole under heavy dependency pressure.

uneven-groups.canvas.description: Highly uneven group sizes, plus an empty group, to stress compaction and whitespace handling.

tasks.title: Confirm sorting goals
tasks.desc: Set the main readability goals for the first version.

tasks.title: Estimate card sizes
tasks.desc: Fit text without clipping.

tasks.title: Assign dependency levels
tasks.desc: Place tasks into preferred vertical bands.

tasks.title: Order groups
tasks.desc: Decide the left-to-right lane order.

tasks.title: Order tasks within lanes
tasks.desc: Reduce crossings in each group.

tasks.title: Compact geometry
tasks.desc: Remove excess whitespace while keeping cards legible.

tasks.title: Optimize edge ports
tasks.desc: Pick better card faces for dependency arrows.

tasks.title: Write command notes
tasks.desc: Explain how the layout command should be used.

tasks.title: Document known limits
tasks.desc: Call out where manual cleanup may still be needed.

tasks.title: Prepare first manual review build
tasks.desc: Bundle the output for visual inspection.
